description: Add a Contact page to the Mateo The Great website with a contact form for visitors to reach out.

userStories.title: Create Contact Page Layout
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see a contact page with a welcoming header and introduction.
acceptanceCriteria: Page has heading 'Get in Touch' with brand gradient styling (matching homepage)
Include a brief intro paragraph below the heading
Use the same layout patterns as other pages (centered content, gradient accent)

userStories.title: Contact Form Component
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want a contact form so I can send a message to Mateo.
acceptanceCriteria: Form has fields: Name (required), Email (required), Message (textarea, required)
Use existing Button and Input components from src/components/ui/
Form validates required fields before submission
On submit, show a success message (no backend needed - just client-side feedback)
Style form to match site aesthetic (dark theme, brand colors)

userStories.title: Add Contact to Navigation
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to easily navigate to the contact page from anywhere on the site.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Contact' link to header navigation in src/components/layout/header.tsx
Link should appear after 'Exclusive' and before 'Sign In'
Link styling matches existing nav links (text-brand-gray, hover:text-white)

nonGoals: No backend email sending - form is just UI
